column1: Ancient Egyptian medicine: Visnaga was used in ancient Egypt as a medicinal herb
column2: recorded in historical texts like the Ebers Papyrus for various health issues.

column1: Treatment for asthma: Its use in traditional medicine involved relieving asthma symptoms due to its bronchodilator effects.
Antispasmodic properties: Visnaga was valued for its ability to alleviate muscle spasms and cramps.
Urinary tract disorders remedy: It was employed to address urinary tract problems and support overall urinary health.
Herbal diuretic: Visnaga was known for its diuretic properties
Traditional antihypertensive agent: It was used in folk medicine to help lower high blood pressure.
Cardiac ailments treatment: Visnaga was utilized in addressing certain cardiac issues due to its perceived medicinal properties.
Muscle spasm relief: Its antispasmodic effects were used to alleviate various muscle spasms.
Folk remedy for kidney stones: It was believed to assist in the dissolution of kidney stones in traditional practices.
Herbal remedy for angina: Visnaga was used as an herbal remedy to alleviate symptoms associated with angina and related heart conditions.
